title: GPT-4 1800B Model Training
description:
GPT-4 (Generative Pre-trained Transformer 4) is a 1.8 trillion parameters language model trained by OpenAI.

There is not much documentation regarding GPT-4's training. In a 2023 keynote, Jensen Huang, the CEO of Nvidia, suggested that the process took 3-5 months and required 25,000 Nvidia A100 80 GB GPUs (NVIDIA, 2023). For this estimate, we have assumed 57,000,000 hours (95 days) of GPU computing, which results in 22,800,000 kW of electricity consumption. Based on the data provided by an arxiv paper by (Jegham et al., 2025), Microsoft Azure Datacentres in 2023 have a carbon intensity of 0.3528 kgCO2e/kWh. Assuming a PUE of 1.12, we further add 2,736,000 kW of electricity consumption.

consumer.name: Infrastructure overhead
consumer.description: Total facility energy consumption with a PUE of 1.12 (Datacenter cooling,lighting and more)
